zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Dronsfield於1373年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親John Dronsfield54歲，母親Joan Stainton30歲。她於1389年與Sir John Wentworth在英國越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1437年10月3日在英國英格蘭越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Dronsfield于1373年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲John Dronsfield54岁，母亲Joan Stainton30岁。她于1389年与Sir John Wentworth在英国越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1437年10月3日在英国英格兰越可爾諾斯 艾爾姆薩爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dronsfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dransfield
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Dronfield in Derbyshire, recorded in the Domesday Book as Dranefeld, from OE drān ‘drone’ + feld ‘open land’, or perhaps from Dransfield Hill in Mirfield, Yorkshire, although this name is more likely to derive from the surname than vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Dronsfield was born in 1373, in Yorkshire, England, her father, John Dronsfield, was 54 and her mother, Joan Stainton, was 30. She married Sir John Wentworth in 1389, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 October 1437, in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Dronsfield est née en 1373, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Dronsfield, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Joan Stainton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wentworth en 1389, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1437, à North Elmsall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

Sie hat 1389 in North Elmsall, Yorkshire, England Sir John Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Dronsfieldが1373年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Dronsfieldは54歳，母Joan Staintonは30歳であった。1389年にイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルでSir John Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1437年10月3日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアノース エルムサルで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Dronsfield(이)가 1373년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Dronsfield(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Stainton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 Sir John Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1437년 10월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르스 엘사에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Dronsfield nasceu em 1373, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Dronsfield, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Joan Stainton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wentworth em 1389, em North Elmsall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Dronsfield родилась в 1373 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Dronsfield было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Stainton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wentworth в 1389 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 октября 1437 г. в местности норт элмсалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.
